mapper.select: select pi.item_type as itemType, coalesce(sum(pa.amount), 0) as total from bms_payment_allocation pa inner join bms_payment_record pr on pr.id = pa.payment_id inner join bms_payable_item pi on pi.id = pa.payable_item_id where pr.pay_time >= #{start} and pr.pay_time < #{end} group by pi.item_type

select dr.dept_id as deptId, d.name as deptName, pi.item_type as itemType, coalesce(sum(pa.amount), 0) as total from bms_payment_allocation pa inner join bms_payment_record pr on pr.id = pa.payment_id inner join bms_payable_item pi on pi.id = pa.payable_item_id inner join dms_registration dr on dr.id = pr.registration_id inner join sms_dept d on d.id = dr.dept_id where pr.pay_time >= #{start} and pr.pay_time < #{end} group by dr.dept_id, d.name, pi.item_type
